textByHash.6c0c289b180ec2b11b5631de6e655336824b2494: Hey you Creature, Dad says you's is gonna get da stabbers!
textByHash.1d871f566706fa3b4ecf920d59702cab026ee0db: Dat's great...Dad want's to hunt da chompy... Da chompy is our bestest yumms! Yous needies da scratchers for makin' dem huh? I's wants some bright pretties for em!
textByHash.f9ce5fa9060b70c89ef29348b24a5e8ce451c864: Bugs wants lots of bright pretties, this many! ~ Bugs quickly opens and closes his hands in front ~ ~ of you to indicate a number of bright pretties. ~ ~ It looks like he wants 10 gold coins.~
textByHash.9620446dec17f8ba3c544880e9dc5e1b56cad895: You's not got da bright pretties... I wants da bright pretties..you not get no scratchers wid'out da bright pretties.
textByHash.de43e3b9ba2872725013b67cf9847b50a3dd11dd: Ok, dat's a good 'un, I got da bright pretties and you got da scratchers!
textByHash.ca6b98b6b72df351c99a7ed60ff220d855394a25: Well, you not have da scratchers den!
textByHash.b2adc9e9ad361d5a0ebfca0c35c281e2ff26985c: I's sorry creature, I don't got no more scratchers! But I got lots of bright pretties! Hope you's get da stabbers for Dad soonly!
textByHash.ea218576a432d53c8c4828c25f353b561e2da63f: Oh we sometimes use da blower on da toadies but Dad don't let us get in da locked box no more. He, he, it was good fun making da toadies fat on da swamp gas.
textByHash.c7b3a084eba242b7463a195c06b6417b9f35deca: You's better talk to Dad, he might have something for you to do.
textByHash.b13de1168bf82ddd55c99dc1cfbd60b0d395df0a: Dad say's you's making da chompy for us! Slurp! Me's has to have equa leaves wiv mine! Chompy is our favourite yummms!
textByHash.15cdd6ca9982f99c0fc9a3d89782d6383633e6aa: Dad say's you's making da chompy for us! Slurp! Me's has to have cabbage wiv mine! Chompy is our favourite yummms!
textByHash.1e2506219c11afee6cc79d0e39a1046f454ec8e3: Have you talked to Dad, he might have something for you to do.
textByHash.244d51617a542dcd40cc2d521e800c3886c1c407: Hey there...we's could smell da Chompy from ages back...it smells lish!
textByHash.62014f82c2fa8c58629e27e6e3aeb346db8129fd: Dad says you can get a lift back with us if you want?
textByHash.2e3b3ecf6ac7019a4fc6196aa81572b3293a9ad2: Dad says you can get a free lift back with us if you want?
textByHash.0a564a0534d66c4be0ac60e46f1fee6a632c8ee1: You's better talk to Dad, him chasey sneaky da chompy.
textByHash.b9728e1b18a97663c22c12bfcef53aca37d7bb41: Thanks for da chompy, it was deloverly!
textByHash.30112553b94296d609dbf83e4b637d28e685ff02: Dad says you can get a lift to Karamja with us if you want? But you's gives us two chompy first!
textByHash.ef4406ebd204e8768472da9cf78bc103864174d5: Dad says you can get a lift back with us if you want? But you's gives us two glug-glugs herbies first!
textByHash.0cf0386a11b633f16b121870b50a96d34f0b8817: Dad sez yous not bringin' da rummy stuff...das bad stuffsies un we get in big bads.
